scripts.build:all: bun run build:functions && bun run build:web
scripts.build:functions: bun build packages/functions/src/auth-google.ts packages/functions/src/auth-callback.ts packages/functions/src/auth-logout.ts packages/functions/src/auth-status.ts packages/functions/src/gmail-threads.ts packages/functions/src/gmail-thread.ts packages/functions/src/gmail-batch.ts packages/functions/src/gmail-labels.ts packages/functions/src/gmail-message-batch.ts --root packages/functions/src --target=node --outdir=netlify/functions --format=esm
scripts.test: bun run test:functions && bun run test:web
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/functions typecheck
